summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of AK Automations website transformation to classy, premium, techy, futuristic design with dark mode
passed_tests: Homepage loads quickly with dark premium theme (rgb(10, 10, 11) background)
Premium Syne and Inter fonts loaded correctly
Navigation links work smoothly with anchor scrolling
Mobile menu toggle opens and closes correctly
Booking modal opens and closes smoothly
Scroll animations are subtle and fast (26 reveal elements, 14 triggered)
Blog page loads correctly with 7 blog cards
Blog post page loads correctly with proper content formatting
Solution cards (8) and testimonial cards (4) have subtle hover effects
All buttons are clickable and functional
Page performance is fast (homepage loads in ~216ms)
Dark theme consistent across all pages
Clean, classy design with premium feel achieved
